expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Users need a notification center where they can see unread badges, open a notification list, mark notifications read or unread, filter by read state, and clear all read notifications.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add schema for notification read state",
      "description": "As a developer, I want to store notification read state so that it persists across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification read state column or table exists",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend endpoints for notifications",
      "description": "As a developer, I want endpoints to fetch, update, filter, and clear notifications so that the UI can function.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Endpoints support fetching, marking read/unread, filtering, and clearing read notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show unread notification badges",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see unread badges so that I know I have new notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Unread badge is displayed when there are unread notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add notification list UI",
      "description": "As a user, I want to open a notification list so that I can see my notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification list can be opened",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add mark read/unread controls",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage them.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Controls exist to mark read or unread",
        "State persists to backend",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add filter by read state UI",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter by read state so that I can easily find unread notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Filter exists for read/unread",
        "List updates based on filter",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add clear all read notifications UI",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that I can clean up my list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Button exists to clear all read notifications",
        "Notifications are removed from backend",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
